headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Marriott International, Raises Price Target to $380
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Stephen Grambling   maintains Marriott International (NASDAQ:MAR) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $353 to $380.

headline: Stifel Maintains Hold on Marriott International, Raises Price Target to $365
summary: Stifel  analyst Simon Yarmak   maintains Marriott International (NASDAQ:MAR) with a Hold and raises the price target from $352 to $365.
